description_long: This sculpture depicts a dramatic, muscular male torso with a dynamic, twisting posture, suggesting movement or struggle. The figure is missing both arms and is mounted on a simple, round pedestal base. The head is turned upward and to the side, with a detailed, curly beard and hair, and an expressive, open-mouthed face. The surface is finely textured, capturing anatomical details such as defined muscles, veins, and facial features. The material appears to be a solid, light-colored stone or marble, giving the sculpture a classical, Greco-Roman aesthetic. The overall impression is one of strength and emotion, reminiscent of ancient heroic or mythological figures.
description: A detailed, classical-style male torso sculpture with a dramatic, twisting pose and expressive facial features, mounted on a round pedestal. The figure is rendered in light-colored stone or marble and is missing both arms.
description_view_0: The back and left side of the sculpture are visible, highlighting the muscular back, curly hair, and the upward tilt of the head.
description_view_1: This view shows the rear and right side, emphasizing the broad back, the twist of the torso, and the pedestal base.
description_view_2: The right side and partial front are visible, showing the chest, the missing right arm, and the detailed facial expression.
description_view_3: The front and left side are prominent, displaying the expressive face, defined chest muscles, and the dramatic posture.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
